# Topside Roofing & Siding - Expert Exterior Solutions

## GAF Master Elite Exterior Solutions

Welcome to Topside Roofing & Siding, your premier partner for high-quality residential roof replacements and complete exterior care. We provide durable, weather-resistant solutions designed to protect your home from the unique Pacific Northwest elements.

[Get a Quote](https://www.topsideroofing.com/contact-us) [(360) 752-2220](tel:3607522220)

![Trust Badges (2).png](https://static.mywebsites360.com/ad2e8254d33d42f0a99eb66ff6e81db4/i/a5ff2e303a31497fbd51c5b92e1efdb4/1/4SoifmQp45JMgBnHmBMTz/Trust%20Badges%20%25282%2529.png)

## Our Roofing and Exterior Services

We offer a comprehensive suite of services to ensure your home remains safe, efficient, and beautiful. From industry-leading roof installations to energy-efficient windows and seamless gutters, our expert team delivers craftsmanship backed by over 35 years of local experience.

## About Our Roofing and Siding Company

With over 35 years of experience and 10,000 satisfied customers, Topside Roofing & Siding is a local leader in home protection. We are proud GAF President’s Club award winners, recognized for excellence in installation.

![35 Years in Business.png](https://static.mywebsites360.com/ad2e8254d33d42f0a99eb66ff6e81db4/i/c6066e7e5c234dbf825b5335d873c9bb/1/nGa1B4amegH1is8tTTA/35%20Years%20in%20Business.png)

## Why choose us

We combine elite certifications with honest, transparent communication to give you peace of mind throughout your project.

- GAF Master Elite Contractor: Only 2% of roofers nationwide hold this distinction.

- 35+ Years Experience: Decades of local expertise in the Pacific Northwest.

- Lifetime Warranties: Exclusive protection that other contractors can't offer.

- Honest Estimates: Clear, upfront pricing with no hidden surprises.


[Get a Quote](https://www.topsideroofing.com/contact-us)

![NEW HP Image 2.jpg](https://static.mywebsites360.com/ad2e8254d33d42f0a99eb66ff6e81db4/i/d08621be7837491bb377c03652201e46/1/4SoifmQp45JMgBnHm9g4L/NEW%20HP%20Image%202.jpg)

## What We Bring

Protect your home today with the exterior experts at Topside Roofing & Siding. Contact us now for a free, no-obligation estimate and experience the difference that elite craftsmanship makes for your property.

[Get a Quote](https://www.topsideroofing.com/contact-us)

## Recent Posts

[![Roofer Sealing Chimney Flashing](https://static.mywebsites360.com/ad2e8254d33d42f0a99eb66ff6e81db4/i/d3ca637f964346abbccd293a7ca86b4d/1/4SoifmQp45JMgBnHghiDJ/1780056758934%2Fimage_0.jpeg)](https://www.topsideroofing.com/post/quick-fixes-for-common-anacortes-roof-leaks)

## [Quick Fixes for Common Anacortes Roof Leaks](https://www.topsideroofing.com/post/quick-fixes-for-common-anacortes-roof-leaks)

Experiencing Anacortes roof leaks requires prompt attention; while temporary fixes can offer immediate relief, a professional solution is crucial for lasting protection. A trusted Anacortes roofing contractor can expertly identify the root cause, performing a comprehensive Anacortes roof inspection and repair to prevent further damage. For reliable Anacortes roof repair and long-term peace of mind, contact a professional Anacortes roofing company.

[![Man inspecting damaged house siding](https://static.mywebsites360.com/ad2e8254d33d42f0a99eb66ff6e81db4/i/e15f3ad207204f14b8dc8de7589b2d21/1/4SoifmQp45JMgBnHghiDJ/1779549647560%2Fimage_0.jpeg)](https://www.topsideroofing.com/post/don-t-ignore-siding-rot-pnw-hidden-dangers)

## [Don't Ignore Siding Rot PNW Hidden Dangers](https://www.topsideroofing.com/post/don-t-ignore-siding-rot-pnw-hidden-dangers)

Living in the Pacific Northwest, constant moisture makes siding rot a significant threat to your home or commercial building, often leading to costly structural damage, pests, and interior mold. Early detection of siding water damage is crucial for effective rotting siding repair, preventing more extensive issues. Whether you need a professional assessment for repair vs replace siding or expert exterior services in Whatcom, Skagit, or San Juan Counties, contact Topside Roofing & Siding for reliable solutions.

[![House in Winter and Summer Split View](https://static.mywebsites360.com/ad2e8254d33d42f0a99eb66ff6e81db4/i/d754808a2f6c4a40a033b214ab9dbd45/1/4SoifmQp45JMgBnHghiDJ/1779550883117%2Fimage_0.jpeg)](https://www.topsideroofing.com/post/keep-your-pnw-home-comfortable-all-year)

## [Keep Your PNW Home Comfortable All Year](https://www.topsideroofing.com/post/keep-your-pnw-home-comfortable-all-year)

Living in the unique PNW climate of Whatcom, Skagit, or San Juan Counties, year-round home comfort and efficiency are paramount. A holistic approach to your home's exterior, including quality roofing, modern siding, and energy-efficient windows, is key to maintaining stable indoor temperatures and preventing damage. Invest in these essential exterior upgrades to ensure your home is resilient, efficient, and comfortable through every season.

[![Happy couple standing on porch of blue house in the rain](https://static.mywebsites360.com/ad2e8254d33d42f0a99eb66ff6e81db4/i/edaaee197d6849259ea02a06730495d4/1/4SoifmQp45JMgBnHghiDJ/1779549723768%2Fimage_0.jpeg)](https://www.topsideroofing.com/post/protect-your-home-the-best-siding-for-rain)

## [Protect Your Home The Best Siding for Rain](https://www.topsideroofing.com/post/protect-your-home-the-best-siding-for-rain)

Protecting your home in the rainy Pacific Northwest demands durable siding designed for our unique climate, offering superior moisture resistance against constant downpours. Investing in quality siding not only safeguards your property from water damage but also enhances curb appeal and boosts energy efficiency, making it a valuable long-term investment. For expert advice on the best siding options and transparent siding replacement cost, trust experienced local siding contractors specializing in PNW conditions.

## Ready to Protect Your Home?

For over 35 years, Topside Roofing has provided Northwest Washington homeowners with durable, weather-resistant roofing and exterior solutions. From expert repairs to full replacements, our team is here to ensure your home stays safe and dry.

[Get a Quote](https://www.topsideroofing.com/contact-us)

[Menu](https://www.topsideroofing.com/#)
